powers.charge_summary: Charges: +1 each time you complete a 5 of a Kind row (x on the die). Resets to 0 at the start of each level.
powers.label: Make 5 of a Kind
powers.description: Tap a die on an incomplete row and pick 1-6 - the whole row becomes that number. Costs 1 charge per use.

powers.charge_summary: Charges: +1 each time you complete a Straight row (x on the die). Resets to 0 at the start of each level.
powers.label: Switch
powers.description: Tap two unlocked dice to swap them anywhere on the board. Costs 1 charge and 1 switch per use.

powers.charge_summary: Charges: +1 each time you complete a Full House row (x on the die). Resets to 0 at the start of each level.
powers.label: Set Any Die
powers.description: Tap an unlocked die on an incomplete row, pick 1-6 - that die changes. Costs 1 charge and 1 reroll per use.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - no charges.
powers.label: Side Switch
powers.description: Swap two adjacent dice left or right. Does not lock either die.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - no charges.
powers.label: Vertical Jump
powers.description: In a column, jump over locked rows to swap with the next unlocked die. Locks both dice after the swap.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - no charges.
powers.label: Second Chances
powers.description: Each die can be vertically swapped twice before it locks (instead of once).

powers.charge_summary: Always available - no charges. Costs 2 rerolls per use.
powers.label: Reroll Trade
powers.description: Tap to spend 2 rerolls and gain 1 switch.

powers.charge_summary: 1 charge per level - refreshes when the level starts (x on the die). Unused charges don't carry over.
powers.label: Switch Rows
powers.description: Tap a die in one row, then a die in another - swaps all dice between those rows (completed rows OK). Costs 1 charge per use.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - adds +5 switches each level.
powers.label: +5 Switches
powers.description: Your switch allowance each level is 5 higher while this power is in your loadout.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - +1 switch when you complete a Straight row.
powers.label: Straight Switch
powers.description: Each time you lock in a Straight row, gain 1 extra switch for this level.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - doubles remaining rerolls once per level when you have both a Full House and a Straight.
powers.label: Combo Reroll
powers.description: Once per level, when you have both a Full House and a Straight on the board, your remaining rerolls double.

powers.charge_summary: Always on while owned - +2 power slots in your loadout (this die uses one slot).
powers.label: +2 Loadout
powers.description: Raise your loadout cap by 2 while owned. This power takes one of those slots, so you can hold one more other power than before.
